    <item>
        <guid>nba526353</guid>
        <title>Josh Giddey: Triple-doubles in defeat</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/josh-giddey-5366</link>
        <description>Giddey recorded 18 points (6-11 FG, 1-3 3Pt, 5-5 FT), 13 rebounds, 10 assists, three blocks and two steals across 35 minutes in Saturday's 125-124 loss to the Grizzlies.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 28 Mar 2026 8:24:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526345</guid>
        <title>Jalen Johnson: Another double-double</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-johnson-5329</link>
        <description>Johnson posted 26 points (11-22 FG, 4-1 3Pt), 10 assists, five rebounds and one steal over 37 minutes during the Hawks' 123-113 win over the Kings on Saturday.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 28 Mar 2026 7:03:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526343</guid>
        <title>Nickeil Alexander-Walker: Strong performance Saturday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/nickeil-alexander-walker-4765</link>
        <description>Alexander-Walker logged 27 points (7-14 FG, 4-9 3Pt, 9-9 FT), eight assists, five rebounds and four steals over 36 minutes during the Hawks' 123-113 win over the Kings on Saturday.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 28 Mar 2026 6:58:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526332</guid>
        <title>Paul George: Full stat line in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/paul-george-3114</link>
        <description>George racked up 26 points (9-19 FG, 4-11 3Pt, 4-5 FT), 13 rebounds, four steals, two assists and one block across 36 minutes in Saturday's 118-114 win over the Hornets.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 28 Mar 2026 5:52:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526330</guid>
        <title>Tyrese Maxey: No rust in return</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/tyrese-maxey-5158</link>
        <description>Maxey (finger) generated 26 points (10-18 FG, 3-6 3Pt, 3-4 FT), eight assists, seven rebounds, one steal and one block across 43 minutes in Saturday's 118-114 win over the Hornets.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 28 Mar 2026 5:46:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
